headlines.title: 3 passengers evacuated from hantavirus-hit cruise ship as new case is confirmed in Switzerland
headlines.description: Three people were medically evacuated from the cruise ship at the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak on Wednesday as one passenger revealed everyone aboard is doing their best to limit contact with each other and follow proper safety protocols.

headlines.title: What to know about rare person-to-person hantavirus transmission
headlines.description: The WHO said that some passengers aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship may have been infected with the deadly hantavirus through extremely rare person-to-person transmission.

headlines.title: Rectal cancer deaths rising rapidly among millennials: 'It's a medical crisis'
headlines.description: Deaths from rectal cancer are rising rapidly among younger adults, an alarming trend that is confounding scientists trying to understand why millennials are so hard-hit.

headlines.title: What does it take to protect brain health? 10 habits to start now
headlines.description: Brain health is of paramount importance to nearly all Americans, yet few are aware of the latest science on how to nurture it

headlines.title: Pancreatic cancer mRNA vaccine shows lasting results in an early trial
headlines.description: Nearly all of the patients who responded to the a personalized mRNA pancreatic vaccine are still alive six years later.

headlines.title: Walmart, Aldi Recall Frozen Pizzas Over Salmonella Concerns
headlines.description: Frozen pizzas and pork rinds sold at Aldi and Walmart are being recalled because the dry milk powder ingredient found in the products may be contaminated with salmonella.

headlines.title: Skin Cancer Prevention Tips: Self-Examination, Sunscreen, More
headlines.description: One in five Americans develop skin cancer at some point in their life and nearly 10,000 people are diagnosed in the United States each day. Board-certified dermatologist Dr. Marnie Nussbaum joins TODAY to share tips for how to identify and prevent skin cancer. She breaks down the ABCs of skin self-examination, explains who is most at risk and talks about how to select the best sunscreen.

headlines.title: FDA Authorizes Fruit-Flavored E-Cigarettes in Major Shift
headlines.description: The FDA announced the first authorization of fruit-flavored e-cigarettes after months of appeals to President Donald Trump from the vaping industry. The decision is certain to be opposed by health groups and parent organizations that have long pointed to flavors as the driver behind underage vaping.

headlines.title: Sick Passengers Evacuated From Hantavirus-Plagued Cruise
headlines.description: Three passengers suspected of being infected with Hantavirus have been evacuated from the cruise ship in the Atlantic and are on the way to get medical care. The World Health Organization has announced there are now eight cases of the virus stemming from the cluster onboard, where three have died. Now, the ship is headed to Spain's Canary Islands where it will dock, as global concerns grow about the spread. NBC’s Camila Bernal reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: The best men’s walking shoes of 2026, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: Shop expert-recommended and staff-tested men’s walking shoes from Brooks, On, New Balance and Hoka.

headlines.title: I’ve tested dozens of workout headphones: These are the best
headlines.description: I tested over a dozen workout headphones from brands like Apple, Beats, and Shokz to find our top picks for running, biking, the gym and more.

headlines.title: Expert-approved walking pads that help you sit less and move more
headlines.description: Fitness trainers share the benefits of using walking pads daily for up to 60 mins. and safety tips. Plus, shop the best expert-approved walking pads.
